reviews.review_description: Note 8, game won't start beyond the screen that tells the story.  Just sits there with no gun and no response to any buttons (apart from exiting the app)

developer_response.body: Thanks for request, we get this to fix

reviews.review_description: It's a fun demo and it wasnt too difficult to play with only the touchscreen. Am I the only one who noticed the victory logo is straight from League of Legends?

I don't know why people were saying this is so hard. I didn't die once and I completed it in my first try. I also recorded the game play to prove it. Too bad it is only a demo because I really want to play the full game and save the universe.

developer_response.body: Thanks for this. If you want we can give you key for beta testing in future.

reviews.review_description:
After the story line I can't move any where or do anything.  It's not frozen as the person is still moving and I can look around the room. ( I just can't move )

Edit:there isn't a blue port

developer_response.body:
Try teleporting to a blue point. Aim it and hold the fire button for a second. 
Maybe this video can help you  https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=X_xJBy_x5yw
What model of device do you have?

reviews.review_title: A very good Starship Troopers clone.
reviews.review_description:
An immersive an furious battle for the galaxy
on Note 8.
I hope the entire game will arrive soon.
It's a pleasure to blast the insects!

developer_response.body: Thanks. Hope you will enjoy full game

reviews.review_description: Wow I really enjoyed this game but more is needed!
